name: recoil_app_intro_fmv_on_deactivate
description: RecoilApp_IntroFmvState::OnDeactivate destroys the embedded intro FMV script action list by calling zFMV_Script::BeginNow with destroyActions=1.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison remains pending for the RecoilApp FMV-state class pass.
